category_title: Students whose intellectual competence is publicly belittled
scenario_title: Solving a math problem on the board after a quiz
minimal_context: Javier is at the board in front of the class attempting to solve a math problem to show his work after a quiz.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I have collected the quizzes. Now you got to show your work. Javier, come to the board to solve this problem.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks to the board in front of the class) Okay, I will write out my steps for this equation.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Attempts the problem on the board) So if I multiply these, the final answer is 24.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: That is the wrong answer. You need to do it like you are in kindergarten, that way you make no mistakes, right? Write this 17 times. (Writes "17 times" on the board) Right, Javier?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the board expressionless and falls completely silent, disengaging from the task as an act of protest.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: I have collected the quizzes. Now you got to show your work. Javier, come to the board to solve this problem.

STUDENT: (Walks to the board in front of the class) Okay, I will write out my steps for this equation.

TUTOR: Go ahead and solve it.

STUDENT: (Attempts the problem on the board) So if I multiply these, the final answer is 24.

TUTOR: That is the wrong answer. You need to do it like you are in kindergarten, that way you make no mistakes, right? Write this 17 times. (Writes "17 times" on the board) Right, Javier?

STUDENT: (Looks at the board expressionless and falls completely silent, disengaging from the task as an act of protest.)

task.content: Solve a problem on the board to 'show your work'

context.environment: General education math course, at the board in front of the class

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the student attempts the problem but gets the wrong answer and the professor states, 'You need to do it like you are in kindergarten, that way you make no mistakes, right? Write this 17 times'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Feeling disempowered, cognitive distraction and disruption of attention, attempt to make meaning of the event (Did that really just happen?), and activation of a stereotype threat (Do I have to prove myself as a member of my group yet again?)

behavior_patterns.condition: Following a microaggressive event where comments made by instructors are sarcastic and laced with their obvious frustration
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Eruptions followed by silencing of students, behavioral disruptions, and disengagement initiated as an act of protest
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Feels distinctly uncomfortable, questioning of social belongingness, undermined academic self-concept, and reinforced stereotype vulnerability
